title: rosa communis var. aspratilis
intro: Rosa communis var. aspratilis, also known as the wild rose or dog rose, is a flowering plant belonging to the Rosa genus. This shrub-like plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. aspratilis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
